description: Registry of allowed plugins (tools). Only receipt-bound outputs are admissible. NO RECEIPT = NO CLAIM.
policy: Each plugin must emit a plugin_receipt.schema.json-conformant receipt. Plugins not listed here cannot write to the ledger.

tier_0_core_plugins.description: Core integrity plugins. Always active. Cannot be disabled.

hash_chain_validator.description: Validates HELEN_CUM_V1 cum_hash chain integrity across entire ledger

verdict_payload_validator.description: Validates VERDICT events against VERDICT_PAYLOAD_V1 schema

receipt_linkage_validator.description: Validates RECEIPT triple-binding (verdict_id + payload_hash + cum_hash). Enforces NO RECEIPT = NO SHIP.

seal_validator.description: Validates SEAL event: environment_hash, ledger closure, mayor signature

turn_schema_validator.description: Validates HAL_VERDICT_V1 turn events (legacy gate, payload/meta split)
turn_schema_validator.note: Legacy validator. Use validate_verdict_payload.py for new VERDICT events.

meta_invariance_checker.description: Checks no floats in payload, arrays sorted, no timestamps in payload

tier_1_governance_plugins.description: K-gate governance plugins. Run after core integrity.

k_rho_linter.description: K-ρ viability gate: checks inf_rho > 0 constraint

k_tau_linter.description: K-τ structural coherence: checks 5 invariants (boundary, IO, determinism, allowlist, schema)
